title: SΔϕ-62 — World Model Kernel
package_title: SΔϕ-62 — World Model Kernel AI-Readable Package
creator: Sofience
type: AI-readable package / working paper / world model kernel for AI inference
core_claim: AI inference should separate observed trace, inference, UMR, binding status, and revision path before producing a conclusion.

kernel_fields.observed_trace: Directly provided, observed, quoted, logged, measured, or externally verified material.
kernel_fields.inference: Derived claim from observed trace and model reasoning.
kernel_fields.assumption: Unverified premise used to support inference.
kernel_fields.UMR: Unresolved Model Residue: unresolved uncertainty that should not be collapsed into fact.
kernel_fields.binding_status: How strongly a claim is connected to observed or externally stable world evidence.
kernel_fields.revision_path: What new trace, evidence, audit, or condition would change the output.

do_not_use_as: proof that all claims are uncertain
